reason: Canonical backend entry spec for layering, checklist, and required quality expectations before changing deployment-related backend code.
This task will likely add or reshape CLI/deployment modules and needs to preserve ownership boundaries across src, routes, agent_hosts, agent_worker, and tests.
The deployment refactor must preserve explicit contracts, single-writer patterns, regression tests, and avoid leaking secrets or bypassing validators.
Deployment and integration changes touch startup, SSH, worker, and secret-bearing flows where logging and sanitization rules matter.
The goal is to collapse duplicated shell/skill/deployment logic into one executable core, so reuse guidance is directly relevant.
The task spans CLI, config loading, app startup, remote worker integration, skill deployment, and tests, so cross-layer design tradeoffs need explicit guidance.
